BENE_AGE_NUM 

LABEL: Beneficiary Age at Screening 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary age at screening. 

LONG NAME: BENE_AGE_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0–118 

COMMENT: Calculated field — screen date minus date of birth.
